scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api,worker -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web dev" "uv run --directory services/platform uvicorn fork_intelligence.api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "uv run --directory services/platform dramatiq fork_intelligence.worker.tasks"
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --directory services/platform alembic upgrade head
scripts.contracts: uv run --directory services/platform python -m fork_intelligence.tools.export_openapi && pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/contracts generate
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web format && uv run --directory services/platform ruff format .
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web format:check && uv run --directory services/platform ruff format --check .
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web lint && uv run --directory services/platform ruff check .
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web typecheck && uv run --directory services/platform mypy src
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @fork-intelligence/web test && uv run --directory services/platform pytest
scripts.smoke:real: uv run --directory services/platform python -m fork_intelligence.tools.real_smoke octocat/Hello-World
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.check:ci: pnpm check && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm security:secrets
